title: Sqlitelogictest wrong results in IN query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, status BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_table (value, status) VALUES (10, TRUE), (NULL, FALSE), (-5, TRUE), (20, NULL);
CREATE TABLE reference_table(ref_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ref_value INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT ref_value FROM reference_table WHERE ref_value IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of IN query with NULL and negative values
